<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Coffee King · All Day House Menu — Warrington</title>
<meta name="description" content="The all-day menu for Coffee King at All Day House, Warrington. Drinks, fresh food, sweet treats and seasonal specials." />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Sofia+Sans+Condensed:wght@600;700;800;900&family=Sofia+Sans:wght@600;700;800&family=Hanken+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --orange:#FB7A02; --orange-bright:#F4931E; --orange-soft:#FFE9CF;
    --brown:#442A19; --brown-soft:#6B4A33; --cream:#FEF9F3; --paper:#FBF3E7;
    --card:#FFFFFF; --line:#EBDDC9; --ink:#3A2416;
    --display:'Sofia Sans Condensed', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --head:'Sofia Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --body:'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(68,42,25,.08); --shadow-lg:0 24px 60px rgba(68,42,25,.16);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
  body{font-family:var(--body);color:var(--ink);
    background:radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 50% -10%, #FFB35E 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg,var(--orange) 0%, #E96F00 100%);
    background-attachment:fixed;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;line-height:1.5}
  .frame{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:18px 14px 40px}
  .sheet{background:var(--cream);border-radius:34px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(120,60,0,.35)}

  /* ---------- NAV BAR ---------- */
  nav.bar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;
    padding:14px 28px;background:rgba(254,249,243,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
  nav.bar .logo{height:34px;width:auto;display:block;max-width:62vw}
  .btn-short{display:none}
  @media(max-width:560px){
    nav.bar .logo{height:26px}
    .btn-label{display:none}
    .btn-short{display:inline}
    nav.bar .btn{padding:11px 15px}
  }
  .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.95rem;border:none;border-radius:13px;padding:12px 18px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, background .15s ease}
  .btn svg{width:18px;height:18px}
  .btn-primary{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(251,122,2,.35)}
  .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(251,122,2,.45);background:#ff8617}
  .btn:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--brown);outline-offset:2px}

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  header.hero{padding:40px 28px 34px}
  .hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.08fr;gap:40px;align-items:center}
  .eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .eyebrow .at{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--brown-soft);text-transform:uppercase}
  .eyebrow .city{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.16em;color:var(--orange);text-transform:uppercase}
  h1.title{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(2.8rem,6.2vw,4.8rem);line-height:.9;color:var(--brown);letter-spacing:-.01em;margin:4px 0 14px}
  .subtitle{font-size:clamp(1.02rem,1.6vw,1.22rem);color:var(--brown-soft);max-width:38ch;font-weight:500}
  .values{display:flex;flex-wrap:nowrap;gap:10px;margin-top:26px}
  .value{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:13px;padding:10px 13px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);white-space:nowrap;min-width:0}
  .value .vi{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--orange-soft);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--orange);flex:none}
  .value .vi svg{width:17px;height:17px}
  .value span{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.84rem;color:var(--brown)}

  .hero-art{position:relative}
  .hero-art .frame-img{position:relative;border-radius:26px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);border:6px solid #fff;aspect-ratio:1/1}
  .hero-art .frame-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
  .hero-art .tagchip{position:absolute;left:-10px;bottom:18px;background:var(--brown);color:#fff;font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.04em;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px}
  .hero-art .tagchip svg{width:18px;height:18px;color:var(--orange-bright)}

  /* ---------- SECTION SHELL ---------- */
  main{padding:6px 22px 22px}
  .panel{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:24px;padding:26px 26px 28px;margin-bottom:22px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
  .panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px}
  .panel-head .ico{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--orange-soft);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--orange);flex:none}
  .panel-head .ico svg{width:24px;height:24px}
  .panel-head h2{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:900;font-size:1.9rem;color:var(--brown);letter-spacing:.01em;text-transform:uppercase}
  .panel-head .sub{font-family:var(--body);font-weight:500;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--brown-soft);margin-left:auto;text-align:right}

  .cols{column-gap:30px}
  .cols-4{columns:4}
  @media(max-width:1000px){.cols-4{columns:2}}
  @media(max-width:620px){.cols-4{columns:1}}
  .grp{break-inside:avoid;margin-bottom:20px;display:inline-block;width:100%}
  .grp h3{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.92rem;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:9px;display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px}
  .grp h3 .sz{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--brown-soft);letter-spacing:.1em;font-weight:700}
  .grp .note{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--brown-soft);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:8px;font-style:italic}
  .row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;font-size:.9rem;padding:3px 0}
  .row .nm{font-weight:500;color:var(--ink)}
  .row .dots{flex:1;border-bottom:1.5px dotted #D9C7AE;transform:translateY(-3px);min-width:10px}
  .row .pr{font-weight:700;color:var(--brown);white-space:nowrap;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
  .row .pr .two{display:inline-flex;gap:10px}
  .pillrow{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;margin-top:4px}
  .pill{background:var(--paper);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 11px;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--brown)}
  .priceflag{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.72rem;color:#fff;background:var(--orange);border-radius:999px;padding:3px 9px;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-left:6px;white-space:nowrap}

  /* ---------- CAKES CAROUSEL ---------- */
  .cakes-panel{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff 0%, #FFF6EA 100%)}
  .cakes-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:18px}
  .cakes-top .lead{max-width:48ch;color:var(--brown-soft);font-weight:500;font-size:.95rem}
  .carousel{position:relative}
  .track{display:flex;gap:20px;overflow-x:auto;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;padding:6px 2px 18px;scrollbar-width:none;-ms-overflow-style:none}
  .track::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
  .cake{scroll-snap-align:center;flex:0 0 clamp(250px,78%,300px);background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease}
  .cake:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg)}
  @media(min-width:760px){.cake{flex-basis:300px}}
  .cake .ph{aspect-ratio:1/1;background:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden}
  .cake .ph img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
  .cake .meta{padding:16px 18px 20px}
  .cake .tag{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
  .cake .tag .price{color:#fff;background:var(--brown);border-radius:999px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:.74rem}
  .cake h4{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:1.12rem;color:var(--brown);margin:8px 0 6px;line-height:1.15}
  .cake p{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--brown-soft);font-weight:500}
  .no-caption .cake .ph{aspect-ratio:4/5}
  .no-caption .cake .meta{padding:14px 18px 16px}
  .no-caption .cake h4{margin-bottom:0}
  .car-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;margin-top:6px}
  .dots{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;flex:1}
  .dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#E3D2BB;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:0;transition:all .2s ease}
  .dot.active{background:var(--orange);width:26px;border-radius:6px}
  .arrow{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--line);background:#fff;color:var(--brown);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;flex:none;transition:all .15s ease}
  .arrow:hover{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;border-color:var(--orange);transform:scale(1.06)}
  .arrow:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--brown);outline-offset:2px}
  .arrow svg{width:22px;height:22px}
  .more-flavours{margin-top:20px;background:var(--paper);border:1px dashed #E0CDB1;border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px}
  .more-flavours .mh{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:10px}

  /* ---------- CATERING / FOOTER ---------- */
  .two-up{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:22px}
  @media(max-width:820px){.two-up{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .catering{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--brown) 0%, #5A3A22 100%);color:#fff;border-radius:24px;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
  .catering .ic{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:14px}
  .catering .ic svg{width:26px;height:26px;color:var(--orange-bright)}
  .catering h3{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:900;font-size:1.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px}
  .catering p{color:#F1E3D5;font-weight:500;font-size:.95rem;max-width:42ch;margin-bottom:18px}

  footer.foot{background:var(--brown);color:#fff;padding:34px 30px}
  .foot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr 1fr auto;gap:30px;align-items:start}
  @media(max-width:820px){.foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
  @media(max-width:520px){.foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .foot img.flogo{height:42px;width:auto}
  .foot .ftag{margin-top:10px;font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange-bright)}
  .foot h5{font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange-bright);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
  .foot h5 svg{width:16px;height:16px}
  .foot p{font-size:.9rem;color:#EBDDD0;font-weight:500;line-height:1.7}
  .socials{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:4px}
  .socials a{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;transition:background .15s ease}
  .socials a:hover{background:var(--orange)}
  .socials svg{width:20px;height:20px}
  .ribbon{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;text-align:center;padding:13px;font-family:var(--head);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.82rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .ribbon svg{width:16px;height:16px}

  @media(max-width:780px){
    .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:26px}
    .hero-art{max-width:360px;margin:0 auto;width:100%}
    .values{flex-wrap:wrap}
    .value{white-space:normal}
    header.hero{padding:30px 20px 26px}
    main{padding:4px 14px 14px}
    .panel{padding:22px 18px}
    nav.bar{padding:12px 18px}
  }

  @media print{
    body{background:#fff !important}
    .frame{padding:0;max-width:none}.sheet{border-radius:0;box-shadow:none}
    .no-print{display:none !important}
    nav.bar{position:static;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
    .panel,.cake,.catering,.foot{box-shadow:none !important;break-inside:avoid}
    .track{overflow:visible;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center}
    .cake{flex-basis:30%;page-break-inside:avoid}
    .cakes-panel{background:#fff}
    @page{margin:12mm}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="frame">
  <div class="sheet">

    <!-- ================= NAV BAR ================= -->
    <nav class="bar">
      <img class="logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Coffee King" />
      <button class="btn btn-primary no-print" id="dlbtn" onclick="window.print()" aria-label="Download menu as PDF">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
        <span class="btn-label">Download PDF</span><span class="btn-short">PDF</span>
      </button>
    </nav>

    <!-- ================= HERO BANNER ================= -->
    <header class="hero">
      <div class="hero-grid">
        <div>
          <div class="eyebrow"><span class="at">at All Day House</span><span class="city">Warrington</span></div>
          <h1 class="title">All Day House Menu</h1>
          <p class="subtitle">Your all-day menu for drinks, fresh food, sweet treats and seasonal specials.</p>
          <div class="values">
            <div class="value"><span class="vi"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 8h1a4 4 0 0 1 0 8h-1"/><path d="M2 8h16v9a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6a4 4 0 0 1-4-4Z"/><line x1="6" y1="1" x2="6" y2="4"/><line x1="10" y1="1" x2="10" y2="4"/><line x1="14" y1="1" x2="14" y2="4"/></svg></span><span>Freshly Made</span></div>
            <div class="value"><span class="vi"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="m2 8 4 4 6-7 6 7 4-4-2 11H4Z"/><path d="M4 21h16"/></svg></span><span>Great Coffee</span></div>
            <div class="value"><span class="vi"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 21s-7-4.35-10-9A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 12 6a5.5 5.5 0 0 1 10 6c-3 4.65-10 9-10 9Z"/></svg></span><span>Friendly Service</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-art">
          <div class="frame-img"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Coffee King takeaway coffee cup on the counter" /></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>

      <!-- ================= DRINKS ================= -->
      <section class="panel" aria-labelledby="drinks-h">
        <div class="panel-head">
          <span class="ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 8h1a4 4 0 0 1 0 8h-1"/><path d="M2 8h16v9a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6a4 4 0 0 1-4-4Z"/><line x1="6" y1="1" x2="6" y2="4"/><line x1="10" y1="1" x2="10" y2="4"/><line x1="14" y1="1" x2="14" y2="4"/></svg></span>
          <h2 id="drinks-h">Drinks</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="cols cols-4">

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Coffee <span class="sz">Reg / Lrg</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Single Espresso Shot</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.15</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Double Espresso Shot</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.35</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Americano</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£2.95</span><span>£3.15</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Latte</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£3.45</span><span>£3.85</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cappuccino</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£3.45</span><span>£3.85</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Flat White</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.70</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cortado</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.20</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Macchiato</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.30</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Original Mocha</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£4.20</span><span>£4.40</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">White Mocha</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£4.20</span><span>£4.40</span></span></span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Hot Chocolate <span class="sz">Reg / Lrg</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Original Hot Chocolate</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£3.65</span><span>£3.95</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">White Hot Chocolate</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£3.75</span><span>£3.95</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cream &amp; Marshmallows</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£0.60</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Tea</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Yorkshire Tea</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Decaf Breakfast</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.40</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Super Fruit Tea</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.40</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Peppermint Tea</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.40</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chamomile Tea</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.40</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Earl Grey Tea</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.40</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Other Hot Drinks</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Classic Chai Tea Latte</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.75</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Iced Coffee <span class="sz">Reg / Lrg</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Latte</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£3.65</span><span>£3.95</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Cappuccino</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£3.65</span><span>£3.95</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Mocha</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£4.20</span><span>£4.50</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Americano</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr"><span class="two"><span>£2.95</span><span>£3.15</span></span></span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Cortado</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.15</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Frappes <span class="sz">each £4.60</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Caramel</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Coffee</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Vanilla</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chocolate</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Strawberry</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Peach</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Passionfruit</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Salted Caramel</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Hazelnut</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Lemon</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.60</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Iced Tea <span class="sz">each £3.50</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Lemon</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Strawberry</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Passionfruit</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Peach</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Vanilla</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chocolate</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Hazelnut</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Caramel</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Salted Caramel</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Iced Lemonades <span class="sz">each £3.50</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Strawberry</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Passionfruit</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Peach</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cloudy</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Blueberry</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Summer Specials</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Coconut Iced Chocolate</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.20</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Caramelised Biscuit Iced Latte</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.30</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">White Choc &amp; Blueberry Frappé</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.95</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Canned Drinks</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Matcha Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.85</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Turmeric Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.85</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Beetroot Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.85</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Ube Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.85</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Coffee Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.65</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Coffee + Syrup</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.25</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Iced Chocolate Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.95</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Syrups <span class="sz">each +£0.60</span></h3>
            <p class="note">*Sugar free option available</p>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Caramel *</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Vanilla *</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Hazelnut *</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chocolate</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Strawberry</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Passionfruit</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Salted Caramel</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Peach</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">+£0.60</span></div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================= CAKES CAROUSEL (replaces Cakes & Sweet Treats) ================= -->
      <section class="panel cakes-panel no-caption" id="cakes" aria-labelledby="cakes-h">
        <div class="panel-head">
          <span class="ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M20 21v-8a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v8"/><path d="M4 16s.5-1 2-1 2.5 2 4 2 2.5-2 4-2 2.5 2 4 2 2-1 2-1"/><path d="M2 21h20"/><path d="M7 8v3M12 8v3M17 8v3M7 4h.01M12 4h.01M17 4h.01"/></svg></span>
          <h2 id="cakes-h">Freshly Baked</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
          <div class="track" id="track">

            <article class="cake">
              <div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Peanut butter and chocolate chip cookie dough traybake" /></div>
              <div class="meta"><div class="tag"><span>Traybake</span><span class="price">£2.95</span></div><h4>Peanut Butter &amp; Choc Chip Cookie Dough</h4></div>
            </article>

            <article class="cake">
              <div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Red velvet blondie with cream cheese frosting" /></div>
              <div class="meta"><div class="tag"><span>Traybake</span><span class="price">£2.95</span></div><h4>Red Velvet Blondie</h4></div>
            </article>

            <article class="cake">
              <div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Blingy double caramel shortbread with gold marbled top" /></div>
              <div class="meta"><div class="tag"><span>Traybake</span><span class="price">£2.95</span></div><h4>Blingy Double Caramel Shortbread</h4></div>
            </article>

            <article class="cake">
              <div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dubai chocolate and pistachio brownie" /></div>
              <div class="meta"><div class="tag"><span>Traybake</span><span class="price">£2.95</span></div><h4>Dubai Chocolate &amp; Pistachio Brownie</h4></div>
            </article>

            <article class="cake">
              <div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Belgian chocolate fudge cake with gold splatter" /></div>
              <div class="meta"><div class="tag"><span>Cake</span><span class="price">£3.15</span></div><h4>Belgian Chocolate Fudge</h4></div>
            </article>

            <article class="cake">
              <div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gooey chocolate brownie" /></div>
              <div class="meta"><div class="tag"><span>Traybake</span><span class="price">£2.95</span></div><h4>Gooey Chocolate Brownie</h4></div>
            </article>

          </div>

          <div class="car-nav no-print">
            <button class="arrow" id="prev" aria-label="Previous cake"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg></button>
            <div class="dots" id="dots"></div>
            <button class="arrow" id="next" aria-label="Next cake"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg></button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="more-flavours">
          <div class="mh">More on the counter</div>
          <div style="columns:2;column-gap:30px">
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Salted Caramel Brownie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Nutella Bueno White Choc Blondie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Choccy Rocky Road</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">S'mores Overload Brownie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cherry &amp; Toasted Almond Brownie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Sea-Salted Espresso Brownie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Jammy Bisky Blondie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Carrot Cake Flapjack</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Ginger, Coconut &amp; Lime Slice</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cronuts</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Brownios</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">from £2.85</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Fruit Custard Tart</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Banoffee Pie</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================= FRESH FOOD ================= -->
      <section class="panel" aria-labelledby="food-h">
        <div class="panel-head">
          <span class="ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 2v7c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h0a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V2"/><path d="M5 2v20"/><path d="M21 15V2a5 5 0 0 0-3 5v6c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h1Zm0 0v7"/></svg></span>
          <h2 id="food-h">Fresh Food</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="cols cols-4">

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Cold Sandwiches</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Egg Mayo in White</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">BLT in White</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Simply Ham / Gammon</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chicken Mayo</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Vegan Cheese Ploughmans</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cheese Savoury — Wholemeal</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">GF Chicken Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Subs <span class="sz">each £3.50</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Coronation Chicken Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Tuna &amp; Sweetcorn</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Barms <span class="sz">each £3.50</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Pulled Pork</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">New York Deli</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Wraps <span class="sz">each £3.50</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Vegan Onion Bhaji</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Buffalo Chicken</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Fajita Chicken</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Ham &amp; Cheese</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Salad &amp; Pasta Boxes <span class="sz">each £3.50</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chicken Caesar Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Tuna Pasta</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chicken &amp; Bacon Pasta</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">BLT Pasta Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Tex-Mex Pasta Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Ham &amp; Egg Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Hot Sandwiches</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Croque Monsieur — Ham &amp; Cheese</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.35</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Ciabatta — Chicken Tikka</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.95</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Croissants</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Plain Croissant</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.65</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Pain au Chocolat</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.95</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Croissant Sandwiches</h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Cheese / Ham / Ham &amp; Cheese</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chicken Salad</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Ploughmans</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.85</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chicken Club</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£4.50</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="grp">
            <h3>Sweet Croissants <span class="sz">each £3.75</span></h3>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Nutella</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Lemon Curd</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.75</span></div>
            <div class="row"><span class="nm">Strawberry &amp; Cream</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£3.75</span></div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================= COLD DRINKS + CATERING ================= -->
      <div class="two-up">
        <section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:0" aria-labelledby="snacks-h">
          <div class="panel-head">
            <span class="ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M8 2h8l-1 4H9Z"/><path d="M9 6h6l1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2Z"/><path d="M8 12h8"/></svg></span>
            <h2 id="snacks-h">Cold Drinks &amp; Snacks</h2>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px;align-items:start">
            <div class="grp" style="margin-bottom:0">
              <h3>Cold Drinks</h3>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Coke Bottle</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.10</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Diet Coke / Cherry Coke</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.00</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Red Bull</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£2.10</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Tropicana Pure Orange</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.95</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Volvic Still Water</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.40</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Pepsi Max Can</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.20</span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="grp" style="margin-bottom:0">
              <h3>Snacks</h3>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Crisps</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.25</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Flapjacks</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.50</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Muffins</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.50</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Chocolate Bars</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">£1.20</span></div>
              <div class="row"><span class="nm">Sweets</span><span class="dots"></span><span class="pr">from £1.50</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        <section class="catering" aria-labelledby="cat-h">
          <div class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M16 21V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16"/></svg></div>
          <h3 id="cat-h">Business Catering</h3>
          <p>Planning a meeting? Ask about sandwich platters, lunch options and refreshments for team meetings and business events.</p>
          <a class="btn btn-primary no-print" href="mailto:hello@coffeeking.co.uk?subject=Catering%20enquiry" style="align-self:flex-start">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-10 5L2 7"/></svg>
            Enquire about catering
          </a>
        </section>
      </div>

    </main>

    <!-- ================= FOOTER ================= -->
    <footer class="foot">
      <div class="foot-grid">
        <div>
          <img class="flogo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Coffee King" />
          <div class="ftag">at All Day House</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h5><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M20 10c0 6-8 12-8 12s-8-6-8-12a8 8 0 0 1 16 0Z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg>Find Us</h5>
          <p>All Day House<br>Centre Park Square<br>Warrington WA1 1QA</p>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h5><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>We're Open</h5>
          <p>Mon – Fri&nbsp;&nbsp;7:30am – 4:00pm<br>Sat&nbsp;&nbsp;8:00am – 3:00pm<br>Sun&nbsp;&nbsp;Closed</p>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h5>Follow Us</h5>
          <div class="socials">
            <a href="#" aria-label="Coffee King on Facebook"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22 12a10 10 0 1 0-11.6 9.9v-7H7.9V12h2.5V9.8c0-2.5 1.5-3.9 3.8-3.9 1.1 0 2.2.2 2.2.2v2.5h-1.3c-1.2 0-1.6.8-1.6 1.6V12h2.8l-.4 2.9h-2.4v7A10 10 0 0 0 22 12Z"/></svg></a>
            <a href="#" aria-label="Coffee King on Instagram"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.5" y2="6.5"/></svg></a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
    <div class="ribbon">
      <span><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" style="vertical-align:-2px"><path d="M12 21s-7-4.35-10-9A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 12 6a5.5 5.5 0 0 1 10 6c-3 4.65-10 9-10 9Z"/></svg> Freshly Made</span>
      <span>•</span><span>Great Coffee</span><span>•</span><span>Friendly Service</span>
      <span><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" style="vertical-align:-2px"><path d="M12 21s-7-4.35-10-9A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 12 6a5.5 5.5 0 0 1 10 6c-3 4.65-10 9-10 9Z"/></svg></span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var track=document.getElementById('track'), dotsWrap=document.getElementById('dots');
  var prev=document.getElementById('prev'), next=document.getElementById('next');
  var carousel=document.getElementById('carousel');
  var cakes=[].slice.call(track.children), current=0;
  var reduce=window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  cakes.forEach(function(_,i){
    var d=document.createElement('button');
    d.className='dot'+(i===0?' active':''); d.setAttribute('aria-label','Go to cake '+(i+1));
    d.addEventListener('click',function(){ go(i,true); });
    dotsWrap.appendChild(d);
  });
  var dots=[].slice.call(dotsWrap.children);

  function setActive(i){ dots.forEach(function(d,idx){ d.classList.toggle('active',idx===i); }); }
  function go(i,user){
    i=(i+cakes.length)%cakes.length; current=i;
    var el=cakes[i];
    track.scrollTo({left:el.offsetLeft-(track.clientWidth-el.clientWidth)/2, behavior:'smooth'});
    setActive(i);
    if(user) restart();
  }
  prev.addEventListener('click',function(){ go(current-1,true); });
  next.addEventListener('click',function(){ go(current+1,true); });

  var raf;
  track.addEventListener('scroll',function(){
    cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
    raf=requestAnimationFrame(function(){
      var center=track.scrollLeft+track.clientWidth/2, best=0, bd=Infinity;
      cakes.forEach(function(el,idx){ var c=el.offsetLeft+el.clientWidth/2, dist=Math.abs(c-center); if(dist<bd){bd=dist;best=idx;} });
      current=best; setActive(best);
    });
  },{passive:true});

  track.setAttribute('tabindex','0');
  track.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){
    if(e.key==='ArrowRight'){e.preventDefault();go(current+1,true);}
    if(e.key==='ArrowLeft'){e.preventDefault();go(current-1,true);}
  });

  /* ---- autoplay: keep them passing horizontally ---- */
  var timer=null;
  function play(){ if(reduce) return; stop(); timer=setInterval(function(){ go(current+1,false); },3500); }
  function stop(){ if(timer){ clearInterval(timer); timer=null; } }
  function restart(){ stop(); play(); }
  ['mouseenter','focusin','touchstart','pointerdown'].forEach(function(ev){ carousel.addEventListener(ev,stop,{passive:true}); });
  ['mouseleave','focusout'].forEach(function(ev){ carousel.addEventListener(ev,play); });
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange',function(){ document.hidden?stop():play(); });
  play();
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
